author: Henricus Dissen Osenburgensis
title: Expositio in totum missale/ Tractatus super officium missae
editions: Köln, Historisches Archiv der Stadt Köln (Stadtarchiv), Best. 7010 (Handschriften - Wallraf) 315, f. 1r-287v; 288r-299v
remarks: Bibliography see Ephemer. Ord. Car. 4. He was friends with Werner Rolevinck, who wrote a lost expositio acc. to Franz.
